title: Quy Nhon、Binh Dinh — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Quy Nhon、Binh Dinh的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Quy Nhon是Binh Dinh的一个城市，人口约450,000。An emerging coastal destination with beautiful beaches, a developing tourism scene, and one of the lowest costs of living among Vietnam’s provincial capitals.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
